summary: First end-to-end test of Household COO app - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 API endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All UI flows functional including landing page, auth gate, feed with smart cards, Sunday Brief (Gemini 3 Flash), floating action bar, add card modal, calendar, vault, and settings tabs.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecated (use Pressable), useNativeDriver not supported in web preview
react_native_issues.note: These are deprecation warnings that don't affect functionality. Can be addressed in future iterations.

seed_data_creation: Re-seeded test session token (test_session_1776435744337) for user Alex Chen (user_test1776435744337, family_test1776435744337). Verified 5 seeded cards and 3 family members exist.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly on first test. Session token needs to be re-seeded before running backend tests (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). The logout test now uses a temporary session token to avoid invalidating the main test session. Gemini 3 Flash integration for Sunday Brief is working and generates meaningful content (takes ~5 seconds).

auth.auth_me: ✓ GET /api/auth/me returns test user with valid session

cards.list: ✓ GET /api/cards returns 5 seeded cards for test family
cards.create: ✓ POST /api/cards creates new card with card_id
cards.update: ✓ PATCH /api/cards/{id} updates status and sets completed_at

family.list_members: ✓ GET /api/family/members returns 3 members (Emma, Liam, Alex Chen)

vault.list: ✓ GET /api/vault returns array (initially empty or with docs from previous tests)

backend_tests.weekly_brief: ✓ POST /api/brief/weekly returns AI-generated brief text (Gemini 3 Flash)

frontend_tests.landing_page: ✓ Loads with 'Your family's Chief of Staff' heading, Google sign-in button (testID: google-signin), language toggle (testID: landing-lang)
frontend_tests.language_switch: ✓ Click landing-lang, select lang-es, heading changes to Spanish, switch back to English works
frontend_tests.authenticated_feed: ✓ With session cookie, shows greeting 'Good afternoon, Alex.', Sunday Brief card (testID: open-brief), 5 smart cards, bottom tabs (Feed/Calendar/Vault/Settings), floating action bar (testID: fab-voice, fab-camera, fab-manual)
frontend_tests.sunday_brief_modal: ✓ Opens on click, shows Generate Brief button (testID: generate-brief), clicking generates AI text via Gemini 3 Flash (~5 seconds), displays meaningful brief content
frontend_tests.add_card_modal: ✓ Opens from fab-manual, shows type selectors (testID: type-SIGN_SLIP, type-RSVP, type-TASK), title/description/assignee inputs, save button (testID: save-add-card), successfully creates card
frontend_tests.mark_card_done: ✓ Click complete-{card_id} toggles card status (OPEN ↔ DONE)
frontend_tests.calendar_tab: ✓ Shows events grouped by day with type pills (TASK, SIGN_SLIP, RSVP)
frontend_tests.vault_tab: ✓ Shows empty state 'Vault is empty' with add button (testID: vault-add)
frontend_tests.settings_tab: ✓ Shows profile with avatar/email, family members list (Emma, Liam, Alex Chen), language row, logout button
